home_hero_subtitle: Our real estate office is located in Esch-sur-Alzette
home_intro_heading: A real estate firm that naturally combines property expertise with legal mastery.
home_intro_text:
At Hargarten-Properties, we bring together legal expertise and real estate market knowledge under one roof. This synergy, unique in Luxembourg, allows us to support our clients at every stage of their project: sales, rentals, acquisitions, investments, and tailored, legally secure contract drafting.
Buying or selling property is far more than a transaction: it is a defining moment in a life, in a family's story. Hargarten-Properties safeguards this decisive step with expertise, discretion, and total commitment.
We are a real estate office located in Esch-sur-Alzette.
home_coming_soon_text: Our curated selection of premium properties is being prepared. Please check back shortly or contact us directly for exclusive early access.
home_services_heading: Full-spectrum expertise, from acquisition to legal certainty.
about_intro_p1: Hargarten-Properties is a Luxembourgish family-owned firm founded by Samuel Hargarten and Laurent Hargarten, both driven by a shared passion for their respective fields.
about_intro_p2: The son, Managing Partner, combines his experience as a real estate advisor, developer, and strategic deal-maker with an instinct for identifying unique opportunities. The father, Partner and a member of the Luxembourg Bar for 30 years, provides the firm with his legal rigor and renowned expertise.
about_intro_p3: A real estate transaction is more than a contract; it is a milestone in the history of a family or a business. Hargarten-Properties safeguards this decisive moment with expertise, discretion, and total commitment.
about_intro_synergy_heading: A Unique Synergy of Real Estate and Law
about_intro_laurent_role: Partner, Member of the Luxembourg Bar
about_intro_body1: We have joined forces to offer a service that is unique in Luxembourg: a seamless blend of market savvy and legal mastery. While one identifies prime opportunities and negotiates the deal, the other secures every legal detail and contract. Together, we provide a high-end, bespoke service defined by safety and sophistication.
about_intro_body2: We offer local market intelligence and a personal touch. Discretion, precision, and tangible results: this is our promise to every client, from private individuals to high-net-worth individuals.
about_intro_body3: A father and son working in tandem, providing an agile, boutique experience without the friction of a large firm. At Hargarten-Properties, you have a family partner who truly understands your needs and protects your interests for the long term.
about_story1_text: With three decades of experience as a lawyer, Laurent Hargarten brings a deep understanding of contracts, negotiation, and what clients truly need — turning legal complexity into clarity and confidence.
about_story2_quote: "Real estate is about understanding people first — their ambitions, their lifestyle, their future. The right property follows naturally."
about_story2_desc: Samuel's passion for real estate is matched by a fresh vision and deep market knowledge — bringing an intuitive sense of what makes a property truly right for the people who will call it home.
about_together_quote: Legal precision meets market intuition, together we turn every transaction into lasting trust.
about_value1_desc: The foundation of every partnership. We build lasting relationships through transparency, active listening, and reliability.
about_value1_quote: We build partnerships founded on transparency and loyalty.
about_value2_desc: Every project is handled with the highest degree of confidentiality. We guarantee absolute privacy in the management of your transactions and assets.
about_value2_quote: Your projects remain in trusted hands, managed with the utmost confidentiality.
about_value3_desc: Our dual mastery of law and property provides a robust legal framework for every operation, ensuring optimal protection and full regulatory compliance.
about_value3_quote: Our legal expertise reinforces the reliability and security of every real estate transaction.
about_value4_desc: A deep understanding of local dynamics allows us to identify the best opportunities and create long-term value for our clients.
about_value5_desc: Detail is everything. We meticulously analyze every scenario to deliver tailored solutions and accurate, dependable results.
about_value5_quote: A commitment to excellence at every stage of your project.
about_value6_desc: Our goal goes beyond a single transaction; we aim to build lasting connections, supporting our clients through every stage of their real estate journey, now and in the future.
about_process_step1_text: Explore our expertise to see how our dual legal and real estate background can serve your specific goals, whether selling, renting, or investing.
about_process_step2_text: Contact us for an initial, no-obligation discussion. This is a confidential space for you to share your expectations and project vision.
about_process_step3_text: Together, we design the ideal roadmap—whether it involves transaction support, contract drafting, or investment advisory. A plan 100% adapted to your situation.
about_process_step4_text: We work in close collaboration: with rigorous follow-up and informed decision-making, we ensure your project reaches a successful and secure conclusion.
about_cta_text: Each residence across Luxembourg selected with precision and care.
services_intro: We provide a suite of services designed to secure your assets and elevate your living experience. Our focus is on legal authority and personalized care.
services_legal_text: We don't just facilitate sales; we architect legally sound agreements that protect your interests for generations. Every clause is scrutinized, every risk mitigated.
services_cta_heading: Discover our curated selection of properties.
services_cta_text: Each residence in our portfolio has been selected with the same precision and care we bring to every mandate.
contact_intro: We value discretion and direct communication. Reach out to our team for a private consultation regarding your real estate requirements.
portfolio_no_match: No properties match your current filters.
cookie_description: We use cookies to analyse site traffic and improve your experience. Essential cookies are always active. Analytics cookies are only set with your consent.
cookie_essential_desc: Required for basic site functionality such as navigation and security. These cannot be disabled.
cookie_analytics_desc: Google Analytics collects anonymous usage data to help us understand how visitors interact with the site. No personal data is shared with third parties.
legal_hosting_text: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, United States.
privacy_intro: Hargarten Properties Sarl-S is committed to protecting your personal data in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy_controller_text: Hargarten Properties Sarl-S, 16 Boulevard Hubert Clement, L-4064 Esch-Alzette, Luxembourg. For data-related inquiries, contact us at Contact@hargarten-properties.lu.
privacy_data_contact: Contact form submissions: name, email address, subject, and message content.
privacy_data_analytics: Analytics data: anonymised usage data via Google Analytics (pages visited, session duration, approximate location), only if you consent to analytics cookies.
privacy_data_server: Server logs: IP address, browser type, and access timestamps, collected automatically by our hosting provider.
privacy_purpose_text: Contact form data is used solely to respond to your inquiry. Analytics data helps us understand how visitors use the site so we can improve it. Server logs are maintained for security and technical troubleshooting.
privacy_storage_text: Contact form data is retained for up to 12 months after your inquiry is resolved. Analytics data is retained for 14 months. Server logs are retained for up to 30 days.
privacy_rights_intro: As a data subject, you have the following rights:
privacy_rights_access: Right of access: request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
privacy_rights_rectification: Right to rectification: request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacy_rights_erasure: Right to erasure: request deletion of your personal data.
privacy_rights_restriction: Right to restriction: request that we limit how we process your data.
privacy_rights_portability: Right to data portability: request your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacy_rights_objection: Right to object: object to the processing of your data for certain purposes.
privacy_rights_outro: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at Contact@hargarten-properties.lu.
privacy_hosting_text: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc. Vercel may process data in the European Union and the United States. For more information, see Vercel's privacy policy at vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy.
privacy_third_party_text: We use Google Analytics to collect anonymised usage statistics. Google Analytics cookies are only set if you give your consent via our cookie banner. No personal data is shared with third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy_cnpd_text: If you believe your data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to file a complaint with the Commission nationale pour la protection des donnees (CNPD), 15 Boulevard du Jazz, L-4370 Belvaux, Luxembourg. Website: cnpd.public.lu.
cookiepolicy_intro: This policy explains what cookies are, how we use them on this website, and how you can manage your preferences.
cookiepolicy_what_text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and understand how you interact with it.
cookiepolicy_essential_text: These cookies are necessary for the website to function correctly. They include cookies that store your cookie consent preference. Essential cookies cannot be disabled.
cookiepolicy_analytics_text: We use Google Analytics to collect anonymised data about how visitors use this website. These cookies are only set if you accept analytics cookies via our consent banner. The data collected includes pages visited, session duration, and approximate geographic location. No personally identifiable information is collected.
cookiepolicy_manage_text: You can change your cookie preferences at any time by clicking the Cookie Settings link in the footer of this website. You can also delete cookies directly through your browser settings.
cookiepolicy_changes_text: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page.
admin_login_demo: Demo mode - any credentials grant access
admin_dashboard_subtitle: Manage your property portfolio and client inquiries.
admin_portfolio_live_desc: All active property listings are publicly visible. The Portfolio link appears in the main navigation menu.
admin_portfolio_hidden_desc: The Portfolio section is offline. The navigation link is removed and visitors see a tasteful ‘Property Listings are coming soon’ message on the homepage.
admin_portfolio_offline_status: Portfolio is offline - coming soon page active
admin_manage_listings_desc: Add, edit, or remove properties from your public portfolio.
admin_upload_hero: Click here to upload the hero image
admin_hero_hint: This is the large image displayed at the top of the property page. Choose the most impressive photo available.
admin_gallery_hint: Add up to 4 additional photos that will appear in the gallery carousel on the property page.
admin_prop_name_section: Property Name — in all three languages (required)
admin_prop_name_hint: Enter the name of the property in each language. All three are required so the listing displays correctly for every visitor.
admin_price_hint: Write the price as displayed, e.g. “1.2M” for sale or “4500/mo” for rent.
admin_available_reserved_hint: “Available” means the property can be visited. “Reserved” means it is under offer.
admin_transaction_hint: Choose whether this property is being sold or rented.
admin_bedrooms_hint: Count only full bedrooms, not offices or dressing rooms.
admin_bathrooms_hint: Include en-suite bathrooms. Toilets without a shower do not count.
admin_surface_hint: Total living area in square metres. Decimals are accepted.
admin_desc_section: Introduction Text — in all three languages (required)
admin_desc_hint_text: Write 1 to 3 sentences that capture the essence of this property. This text appears directly below the title on the property page.
admin_add_amenity_subtitle: Not in the list above? Create it here with all three language translations.
admin_add_amenity_desc: Enter the name of the new amenity in all three languages. Once added, it will appear in the list above and will be automatically selected for this property.
admin_step1_subtitle: Upload the main photo of the property. This is the first image visitors will see — make it count.
admin_step1_hint: Upload a high-quality photo of the exterior or the most impressive room. Supported formats: JPG, PNG. Maximum size: 10 MB.
admin_step2_subtitle: Enter the core details about this property: its name in all three languages, location, asking price, availability, and transaction type.
admin_step2_hint: The property name must be provided in English, Luxembourgish, and French so that the listing displays correctly for all visitors.
admin_step3_subtitle: Enter the technical specifications: number of bedrooms, bathrooms, and total surface area in square metres.
admin_step3_hint: Use whole numbers for bedrooms and bathrooms. For surface area you can write decimals, e.g. 142.5.
admin_step4_subtitle: Write a short, compelling introduction for this property in all three languages. This text appears on the property detail page.
admin_step4_hint: Keep it concise — 1 to 3 sentences. Focus on what makes this property special. You must provide all three language versions.
admin_step5_subtitle: Select all the amenities this property offers by clicking on them. If an amenity is not in the list, use the form at the bottom to add it with its translation in all three languages.
admin_step5_hint: Amenities that are already used on other listings appear below. Tick all that apply. To add a brand-new amenity, fill in the three fields at the bottom and click “Add Amenity”.
